sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «خَيْرُ الْكَلَامِ مَا قَلَّ وَدَلَّ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «NajboIji govor je onaj koji je kratak i jasan».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «The best speech is that which is brief and clear».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الْكَلَامَ الْمُخْتَصَرَ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الطَّوِيلِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je kratak govor bolji od dugog.
sentences.translationEn: This means that brief speech is better than long speech.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ وَلِيدٌ رِسَالَةً قَصِيرَةً وَوَاضِحَةً لِمُعَلِّمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Walid je napisao kratku i jasnu poruku svom učitelju.
sentences.translationEn: Walid wrote a short and clear message to his teacher.

sentences.arabic: فَهِمَ الْمُعَلِّمُ الرِّسَالَةَ بِسُرْعَةٍ وَرَدَّ عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Učitelj je brzo razumio poruku i odgovorio na nju.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher understood the message quickly and replied to it.
